paymentRequestLifecycleId.description: Unique identifier assigned by Mastercard, to identify the payment request in subsequent transactions or services.

stepUpMessage.description: Text message that DSP will be providing to display to the Debtor on Creditor website or application.

applicationUrl.description: URL that will be used by the Debtor to open the banking app from Creditor's website or application on a single device journey. Creditor should only use this when it's a single device journey.
